summary: Excellent vintage recording praised as a must‑have for Deadheads, with superb sound that captures the era.
review: The reviewer hails this taping as a great recording that showcases the sound of a bygone Dead era and even suggests it may surpass other existing recordings of the same show. No specific performance details are given, but the tape is deemed essential for any collector.

ai_rating.rationale: Single enthusiastic 5‑star review praises both recording quality and overall value; limited data leads to low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the tape as a great recording with classic Dead era sound, noting no issues.
